# Blossom

> Blossom analyzes viral social media content from Instagram and TikTok, classifying hooks, formats, and tactics using multi-stage Gemini AI to surface trends, score virality, and produce content improvement suggestions. Built for creators, agencies, and brands who want to understand what makes content perform.

## Product
- [Homepage](https://blossai.com/): Overview, features, pricing
- [Sign up](https://blossai.com/signup): Create a free account
- [FAQ](https://blossai.com/faq): Common questions about pricing, plans, API access, and supported platforms

## Documentation
- [Full LLM-friendly docs dump](https://blossai.com/llms-full.txt): Concatenated reference for everything below
- [Public API Reference](https://blossai.com/llms-full.txt#public-api): Endpoints, X-API-Key authentication, rate limits, category scoping
- [Architecture Overview](https://blossai.com/llms-full.txt#architecture): How the system is organized
- [Content Analysis Pipeline](https://blossai.com/llms-full.txt#content-analysis-pipeline): How videos are fetched and analyzed

## Public API endpoints
Auth: send `X-API-Key: blsm_<key>` header. Rate limits: 100/min (platin plan), 600/min (admin).

- `GET /api/v1/videos` — Analyzed videos with virality scores, hooks, formats, tactics
- `GET /api/v1/influencers` — Influencer profiles with follower tiers
- `GET /api/v1/hooks` — Hook classifications and patterns
- `GET /api/v1/formats` — Format taxonomy
- `GET /api/v1/tactics` — Tactic library
- `GET /api/v1/music` — Music and audio metadata
- `GET /api/v1/suggestions` — Content improvement suggestions
- `GET /api/v1/trending` — Trending content aggregation
- `GET /api/v1/categories` — Category filters
